name: tinyblog
description: A personal blog CMS built on Cloudflare Workers, D1, and R2.

scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute tinyblog-db --local --file=./migrations/0001_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute tinyblog-db --local --file=./migrations/0002_published_at_site_config.sql && wrangler d1 execute tinyblog-db --local --file=./migrations/0003_site_url.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute tinyblog-db --remote --file=./migrations/0001_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute tinyblog-db --remote --file=./migrations/0002_published_at_site_config.sql && wrangler d1 execute tinyblog-db --remote --file=./migrations/0003_site_url.sql
